headline: McCormick Appoints Cindy Hoots to Board of Directors
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC), a global leader in flavor, today announced that Cindy Hoots, former Chief Digital Officer & CIO, AstraZeneca PLC, has been appointed to the Board of Directors of McCormick effective June 1, 2026.
